name: teamsherrard-realtor
description: Team Sherrard's plug-and-play AI systems for real estate agents.

plugins.name: realtor-ai-brain
plugins.description: PLUGIN 1 — install first. The Realtor AI Brain: one shared brain (the agent's identity + memory) that powers every other system. Run 'Set up my Brain' once, and every tool already knows the agent.

plugins.name: realtor-ai-admin
plugins.description: PLUGIN 2 — the AI Admin (The Agent Leverage OS). Books the calendar, drafts email in the agent's voice, sorts the inbox, remembers every client, briefs them at 7am. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first.

plugins.name: realtor-youtube-system
plugins.description: PLUGIN 3 — the YouTube System. Starts with a complete YouTube Game Plan (built on Mike Sherrard's frameworks) — channel audit, 3 high-intent pillars, ~50 exact titles, goal-math, and a 90-day plan — then ideation, research, SEO, scripting in the agent's own voice, lead magnets, repurposing, analytics, and coaching. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first.

plugins.name: realtor-shortform-system
plugins.description: PLUGIN 4 — the Short-Form System. A routine-based short-form OS: daily green-screen reactions, talking-head value, and carousels, each optimized for Instagram/Facebook, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. The agent thinks in formats; Claude keeps the funnel balanced. Text only — never films or designs. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first.

plugins.name: realtor-lead-capture
plugins.description: PLUGIN 5 — the Lead Capture System. Turns the agent's offer into a lead magnet (a brand-led guide for their whole audience, or a focused buyer/seller guide) and maps the opt-in funnel that gives it away — two aligned documents they take to claude.ai/design to build. Text only: it writes the copy and structure, never designs or hosts; lead capture only, no call booking. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first.

plugins.name: realtor-ai-editor
plugins.description: PLUGIN 6 — the AI Editor. The agent talks in plain English; Claude directs Descript (their own account) to do the real editing — long-form and short-form in one tool — while they watch it happen live. Claude adds the multi-source B-roll Descript can't source itself (the agent's own footage, listing photos, free stock libraries), and a navigator skill turns vague or messy requests into one clear plan so the agent is never overwhelmed. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first, plus a Descript connection.
